testcase.name: Complete Onboarding Flow › Full user journey: Signup → Onboarding → Upload → Generate

failure.message: onboarding-flow.spec.ts:22:7 Full user journey: Signup → Onboarding → Upload → Generate

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › onboarding-flow.spec.ts:22:7 › Complete Onboarding Flow › Full user journey: Signup → Onboarding → Upload → Generate Error: locator.isVisible: Error: strict mode violation: locator('text=Download') resolved to 2 elements: 1)
Download
aka getByText('Download', { exact: true }) 2)

Review and edit before download

aka getByText('Review and edit before') Call log: - checking visibility of locator('text=Download') 196 | 197 | // Check for download or view button > 198 | const hasDownload = await page.locator('text=Download').isVisible() | ^ 199 | const hasView = await page.locator('text=View CV').isVisible() 200 | 201 | expect(hasDownload || hasView).toBeTruthy() at C:\Users\jaket\Desktop\CV\cv-adapter\tests\e2e\onboarding-flow.spec.ts:198:61 attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\..\test-results\onboarding-flow-Complete-O-70445-oarding-→-Upload-→-Generate-chromium\test-failed-1.png ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── attachment #2: video (video/webm) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\..\test-results\onboarding-flow-Complete-O-70445-oarding-→-Upload-→-Generate-chromium\video.webm ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── Error Context: ..\..\test-results\onboarding-flow-Complete-O-70445-oarding-→-Upload-→-Generate-chromium\error-context.md
testcase.system-out:
📍 Step 1: Navigating to signup page... ✅ Signup page loaded with usage limit banner 📍 Step 2: Logging in... ✅ Logged in successfully 📍 Step 3: Checking onboarding modal... ✅ Onboarding modal is mandatory (no skip/close buttons) 📍 Step 4: Completing onboarding... ✓ Selected goal: Get a new job ✓ Clicked Next ✓ Clicked Upload CV Now ✅ Redirected to upload page 📍 Step 5: Uploading CV file... ⏳ Uploading and parsing CV... (this takes ~60 seconds) ✅ CV uploaded successfully and redirected to generation page 📍 Step 6: Filling job details... ✓ Filled job title: Senior Software Engineer ⏳ Filling job description... ✅ Job description filled 📍 Step 7: Generating tailored CV... ⏳ AI is generating your CV (this may take 30-60 seconds)... ✅ CV generated successfully 📍 Step 8: Testing review page... Current URL: https://www.mycvbuddy.com/generate/714f3262-c898-4499-bcee-7cac2fd39116
[[ATTACHMENT|onboarding-flow-Complete-O-70445-oarding-→-Upload-→-Generate-chromium\test-failed-1.png]]

[[ATTACHMENT|onboarding-flow-Complete-O-70445-oarding-→-Upload-→-Generate-chromium\error-context.md]]

failure.message: onboarding-flow.spec.ts:22:7 Full user journey: Signup → Onboarding → Upload → Generate

testcase.failure:
[firefox] › onboarding-flow.spec.ts:22:7 › Complete Onboarding Flow › Full user journey: Signup → Onboarding → Upload → Generate
Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed
Locator: locator('text=Welcome to My CV Buddy!') Expected: visible Timeout: 5000ms Error: element(s) not found
Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for locator('text=Welcome to My CV Buddy!')
56 | 57 | // Wait for onboarding modal to appear > 58 | await expect(page.locator('text=Welcome to My CV Buddy!')).toBeVisible({ timeout: 5000 }) | ^ 59 | 60 | // Verify 3-step process is shown 61 | await expect(page.locator('text=Upload → Generate → Download')).toBeVisible() at C:\Users\jaket\Desktop\CV\cv-adapter\tests\e2e\onboarding-flow.spec.ts:58:64
attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\..\test-results\onboarding-flow-Complete-O-70445-oarding-→-Upload-→-Generate-firefox\test-failed-1.png ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

testcase.failure:
[webkit] › onboarding-flow.spec.ts:242:7 › Complete Onboarding Flow › Verify onboarding cannot be skipped
Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed

testcase.name: Complete Onboarding Flow › Full user journey: Signup → Onboarding → Upload → Generate

failure.message: onboarding-flow.spec.ts:22:7 Full user journey: Signup → Onboarding → Upload → Generate

testcase.failure:
[Mobile Safari] › onboarding-flow.spec.ts:22:7 › Complete Onboarding Flow › Full user journey: Signup → Onboarding → Upload → Generate
TimeoutError: page.waitForURL: Timeout 90000ms exceeded. =========================== logs =========================== waiting for navigation to "**/generate/**" until "load" ============================================================
115 | // Wait for upload to complete - CV parsing takes about 1 minute 116 | // After upload, it redirects to /generate/[id] page > 117 | await page.waitForURL('**/generate/**', { timeout: 90000 }) | ^ 118 | 119 | console.log('✅ CV uploaded successfully and redirected to generation page') 120 | at C:\Users\jaket\Desktop\CV\cv-adapter\tests\e2e\onboarding-flow.spec.ts:117:16
attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\..\test-results\onboarding-flow-Complete-O-70445-oarding-→-Upload-→-Generate-Mobile-Safari\test-failed-1.png ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
attachment #2: video (video/webm) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ..\..\test-results\onboarding-flow-Complete-O-70445-oarding-→-Upload-→-Generate-Mobile-Safari\video.webm ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Error Context: ..\..\test-results\onboarding-flow-Complete-O-70445-oarding-→-Upload-→-Generate-Mobile-Safari\error-context.md
